_comment: Neutral baseline. Auto-copied to config/profile.json on first `pnpm run dev` or `pnpm run ui` if missing. Universal sections are the same for every fork; personal weights are zeroed and personal keyword arrays are empty. Run Settings → Scoring profile → Regenerate (or finish onboarding) to overlay your personal layer from config/candidate-brief.md.

weights._comment_personal: Personal — zeroed in the default. The LLM-generated delta overwrites these from your candidate brief. (web3/ai scoring moved to the `categories` block below — each category carries its own optional weight.)
weights._comment_role: Shared per-match bonus for any target role (see `roles` below). roleTitle fires when the title matches a role; roleBody for role-specific phrases in the body.
weights._comment_seniority: Seniority — kept on by default since the senior-req hard-drop already filters out junior roles.
weights._comment_universal: Universal — work for any senior IC search.

keywords._comment_universal: Hard-exclude lists. These reject obvious mismatches and apply to anyone.
keywords._comment_specialties: Personal — empty in the default. Filled automatically from the brief's 'what to avoid' paragraph during Regenerate.
keywords._comment_geo: Persona-NEUTRAL geo extraction. No country is privileged. `locationLock` / `onsiteOnly` detect that a posting is geographically or work-arrangement constrained; `worldwideRemote` detects open-to-anyone postings. The keep/drop DECISION compares these against your `location` block below (acceptedRegions / basedIn / workTypes) — see `hard_location_incompatible` in src/filters.ts. Edit your preferences in the `location` block (or the Profile tab), not here.
keywords._comment_personal_kw: Personal — empty in the default. Filled automatically from the brief during Regenerate. (web3/ai keyword lists moved to the `categories` block below.)
keywords._comment_seniority_kw: Seniority signals — used for the +leadTitle / +seniorTitle bonuses.
keywords._comment_location_kw: Fallback remote signal used only for older profiles that have no `location` block. The live geo logic reads the `location` block below.

_comment_roles: Personal — empty in the default. The target job titles you're interested in (e.g. Senior Frontend Engineer, Product Engineer). Filled automatically from the brief during Regenerate, or edited via Profile → Role interests. A title matching any role's `titleMatch` earns the roleTitle bonus, is tagged on the job, and is rescued from the title-based hard drops.
_comment_categories: Personal — empty in the default (config-driven taxonomy; no category is privileged). Filled automatically from the brief during Regenerate, or edited via Profile → Categories. A job is tagged with EVERY category whose keywords match (`Job.categories`), grouping it in the UI / JOBS.md; jobs matching none fall under a synthetic 'Other'. Each entry: { id (stable key), label (display), keywords (PLAIN words/phrases, matched whole-word + case-insensitively; list both singular/plural if needed), scope? ('title-body' default | 'body' for body-only noise control), weight? (points added to fitScore when matched, default 0 = pure label), limit? (max rows in the JOBS.md section, default 20) }. Example: { "id": "web3", "label": "Web3", "keywords": ["web3", "crypto", "defi", "wagmi", "viem"], "weight": 20 }.
_comment_location: Personal location preferences (edit on the Profile tab, or filled from your brief during Regenerate). NEUTRAL default: accepts every work type and every region, so a fresh fork drops nothing on geography. `basedIn` = where you live; `workTypes` = arrangements you accept (remote/hybrid/onsite); `acceptedRegions` = region terms you'll work in (e.g. 'europe', 'emea', 'united states'); `excludeOutsideAcceptedRegions` = hard-drop region-locked jobs outside those regions (false → soft-penalize instead).
